fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

<see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKDocumentXpsOptions" /> provides configuration options for XPS document generation, including the output resolution and whether to exclude PNG images.

## Examples

```csharp
var options = new SKDocumentXpsOptions
{
    DPI = 144.0f,
    AllowNoPngs = false
};
using var stream = SKFileWStream.OpenStream("output.xps");
using var doc = SKDocument.CreateXps(stream, options);
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Options for creating an XPS document using SkiaSharp.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if PNG images may be excluded; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether PNG images may be excluded from the XPS document.

fields.value: The DPI value used when rendering content into the XPS document.
fields.summary: Gets or sets the dots per inch (DPI) resolution for the XPS document.
